creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text: GCC 6 has been unsupported upstream for a long time. Since we now have lang/gnat12, would it be possible to rebuild lang/gnat12 using lang/gnat12 itself for bootstraping, then replace every dependency on lang/gcc6-aux with a dependency on lang/gnat12, and finally deprecate and remove lang/gcc6-aux?
